message: [6]: The user is staying connected to their mother by sitting on her favorite special bench in her own home.
raw_message: My mom's house had a special bench near the window. She loved to sit there every morning and take in the view. I come to sit here sometimes, it helps me stay connected to her.
reason: The sentimental value of the special bench

fact: user has a pendant that reminds them of their mother

message: [12]: The person values teaching yoga to maintain a purpose and make others happy.

attribue: user, grief stricken, recently lost parent
user: woman, hugged by another woman
fact: dad passed away two days ago
message: [18]:  The message expresses the loss of a loved one, with the author displaying both sadness due to the tragic unexpected passing of dad, but they are also using comforting and optimistic ways, like spending more time with the family in order to keep cherished good memories.
raw_message: Hey Jolene, sorry to tell you this but my dad passed away two days ago. It's been really tough on us all - his sudden death left us all kinda shell-shocked. I'm trying to channel my grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories. These moments remind me to live life fully. (image description: a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch)
reason: Sudden death of the dad left them shell-shocked

message: [20]: The user reminisces about their positive family memories from the past.
raw_message: Even though it's hard, it's comforting to look back on the great memories. We looked at the family album. Photos give me peace during difficult times. This is my parents' wedding in 1993. (image description: a photo of a bride and groom posing for a picture)
reason: Looking back on great memories is comforting.

message: [24]: The user expresses their love and gratitude for their relationship.
